appliedUpdates.description: Documented API response envelope format ({success, data}/{success, error}) in architecture.md — frontend consumers must unwrap responses
Documented ESLint ^9 peer dependency compatibility note in environment.md

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document that agent-browser's click tool fails with 'Resource temporarily unavailable' on elements that trigger navigation/page unload. Workers should use evaluate_script with dispatchEvent as a workaround for clicking navigation links.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature dashboard-layout-pages worker reported that agent-browser click command failed on sidebar navigation buttons triggering page unload, requiring fallback to JS event dispatch.

rejectedObservations.observation: API test suite fails with exit code 1 due to port 4000 conflict when dev server is running
rejectedObservations.reason: already-documented — This is already in AGENTS.md under 'Known Pre-Existing Issues (Do Not Fix)'

rejectedObservations.observation: tsx seed command used in prisma.config.ts for Prisma 7 compatibility
rejectedObservations.reason: already-documented — This was applied as a code fix in the cross-area-integration feature commit and is reflected in Prisma config
